purpose: Make the Stage 7A-7C working contract enforceable with a machine-readable batch manifest, a merge-before-Lovable handoff gate, and project-memory refresh requirements for future larger PRs.

stages.title: Batch plan manifest
stages.outcome: Future multi-stage PRs must declare included stages, scope, affected artifacts, required checks, and the post-merge Lovable prompt before implementation is considered complete.

stages.title: Merge-before-Lovable handoff gate
stages.outcome: A repository script can evaluate whether Lovable prompt handoff is allowed only after the Pull request is merged into main, local main is verified, and required checks have passed.

stages.title: Project-memory refresh automation
stages.outcome: Project-memory files record the completed batch, next-stage hypothesis, batch-size policy, and artifacts so future work starts from current repository facts.

batchPlanPolicy.samePullRequestJustification: All three stages enforce the development workflow contract and do not modify product runtime behavior.

lovableSyncPrompt.expectedConfirmation: Confirmed: Stage 7D-7F synced from main, no conflicts.
